title: Remove survey embed and replace with static placeholder on Survey page

requirements.text: In SurveyPage.tsx, remove the CPX Research iframe embed (app_id=30743), any associated survey scripts, API calls, or survey widget loading logic. Replace the survey content area with a simple static message: 'Surveys are currently unavailable. Please check back later.' Preserve the existing page layout, header section, card container styling, and overall design.

quotes: Remove the survey form and the message that says: 'Unfortunately we could not find a survey for your profile. Try again in a few hours.'
Replace that section with a simple placeholder message like: 'Surveys are currently unavailable. Please check back later.'
Make sure no survey script, API call, or survey widget is loading in the background.
Keep the Survey page layout, header, and design the same.

acceptanceCriteria: The CPX Research iframe is no longer rendered on the Survey page.
No survey-related scripts, API calls, or widget initializations occur when visiting the Survey page.
The text 'Unfortunately we could not find a survey for your profile. Try again in a few hours.' does not appear anywhere on the page.
The placeholder text 'Surveys are currently unavailable. Please check back later.' is displayed in the survey content area.
The Survey page header, card container, and overall layout remain visually unchanged.
The page loads without any JavaScript errors in the browser console.

constraints: Do not delete or rename the SurveyPage.tsx file or its route.
Do not modify the Header, Footer, or Layout components.
Do not alter the page's visual design, color scheme, or typography.
nonGoals: Adding any new survey provider or integration.
Modifying any page other than SurveyPage.tsx.
